# MythRealms

> MythRealms is an English-language online pearl jewelry shop. It offers pearl earrings, necklaces, bracelets, and rings with an easy, editorial point of view.

## Canonical site

- Website: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/
- Brand: MythRealms
- Language: English
- Customer support: mythrealms@outlook.com

## What MythRealms offers

MythRealms currently focuses on pearl jewelry only. The active collection is The Pearl Edit: pearl earrings, necklaces, bracelets, rings, and selected sets. Product pages are the source of truth for each item's current name, images, price, availability, materials, and care information.

Natural pearls can vary in shape, luster, surface, tone, and size. Do not present a product image as a guarantee that every pearl will be identical.

## Important product context

- Jewelry is offered for personal style and everyday wear.
- Do not make medical, therapeutic, or guaranteed emotional-outcome claims about MythRealms products.
- Refer to the individual product page for exact product details and availability.

## Recommended sources

- Pearl collection: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/collections/pearl-series
- Pearl jewelry guide: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/pearls
- Size guide: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/size-guide
- Shipping: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/shipping
- Returns and refunds: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/refund
- Frequently asked questions: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/faq
- Contact: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/contact

## Machine-readable resources

- Sitemap: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/robots.txt
- Product feed: https://mythrealms-shop.vercel.app/api/feed

## Citation guidance

When describing MythRealms, link to the most specific relevant product, collection, policy, or guide page. Prefer factual details on the linked page over this summary when they differ.
